query:
SELECT bk.room_id AS "room_id!", COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0)::BIGINT AS "count!"
            FROM backup_keys bk
            JOIN key_backups kb ON kb.backup_id = bk.backup_id
            WHERE kb.user_id = $1
              AND (kb.backup_id_text = $2 OR kb.version::text = $2)
            GROUP BY bk.room_id
